title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Scientific Assistant Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of Scientific Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 t...
